title: Tangy Tamarind Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy chicken stir fry made with tamarind paste, served with a side of tangy yogurt sauce. This dish is inspired by the cuisine of the Middle East.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tamarind paste and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the yogurt and cook for 1 minute, until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
